metadata.feature_name: Dashboard TypeScript Types & Data Loader Infrastructure

tasks.name: Create TypeScript interfaces for all 7 dashboard widget data types

action.target: TypeScript interfaces for 7 widget data types

tasks.purpose: Define type-safe data contracts for all dashboard widgets enabling widget development with predictable data shapes

constraints: Follow existing interface patterns from feature.md
Use descriptive field names matching database columns
Include JSDoc comments for each interface

tasks.input_state: Feature document defines required widget data structures. No loader file exists yet.
tasks.output_state: File created at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts with 'server-only' directive and 7 interfaces defined: ProgressOverviewData, RecentActivityData, UpcomingTasksData, SkillsRadarData, PresentationsTableData, CoachingSessionsData, QuickActionsData. Each interface has JSDoc comments and proper TypeScript types.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: TypeScript compiles without errors and all 7 interfaces are defined with correct field types matching feature.md specifications

tasks.name: Create loadDashboardPageData function with React cache wrapper and Promise.all
tasks.purpose: Establish loader infrastructure enabling efficient parallel data fetching for all dashboard widgets

constraints: Use React cache() wrapper for per-request memoization
Use Promise.all() for parallel fetching of 7 widget loaders
Return tuple matching [ProgressOverview, RecentActivity, UpcomingTasks, SkillsRadar, PresentationsTable, CoachingSessions, QuickActions]

tasks.input_state: 7 widget interfaces are defined. Individual loader functions do not exist yet.
tasks.output_state: loadDashboardPageData function created and exported from dashboard-page.loader.ts. Function wraps internal dashboardLoader with React cache(). Internal loader uses Promise.all() to call 7 individual loader functions in parallel. Service logger initialized.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: loadDashboardPageData function exists, is exported, uses cache() wrapper, and calls 7 loaders in Promise.all()
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export const loadDashboardPageData = cache' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'Promise.all' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'createServiceLogger' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts

tasks.name: Implement 7 individual loader functions returning empty/default data

action.target: 7 individual loader functions with empty returns

tasks.purpose: Provide placeholder loader functions enabling immediate widget development while real queries are added later

constraints: Create 7 async functions: loadProgressOverview, loadRecentActivity, loadUpcomingTasks, loadSkillsRadar, loadPresentationsTable, loadCoachingSessions, loadQuickActions
Each function returns Promise resolving to empty/default data matching its interface
Use try/catch with logger.error for error handling pattern
Add JSDoc comment explaining these are placeholder implementations
Empty data examples: empty arrays [], 0 for numbers, null for optional fields, false for booleans

tasks.input_state: Interfaces defined, loadDashboardPageData exists but references undefined loader functions.
tasks.output_state: 7 loader functions implemented in dashboard-page.loader.ts. Each returns appropriate empty/default data. Functions are called from Promise.all() in loadDashboardPageData. Error handling pattern established with try/catch and logging.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All 7 loader functions are implemented, return data matching their interfaces, and are invoked from loadDashboardPageData
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && grep -E 'async function load(ProgressOverview|RecentActivity|UpcomingTasks|SkillsRadar|PresentationsTable|CoachingSessions|QuickActions)' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts | wc -l | grep -q '^7$'

tasks.name: Export DashboardData aggregate type using Awaited<ReturnType<>> pattern
tasks.purpose: Provide type-safe contract for dashboard page enabling type inference and auto-completion in consuming components

constraints: Follow team-account-workspace.loader.ts pattern: export type DashboardData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof loadDashboardPageData>>
Add JSDoc comment explaining this type represents the shape of all dashboard data
Run lint and format commands after adding export
Verify TypeScript resolves the type correctly

tasks.input_state: loadDashboardPageData is fully implemented and returns a tuple of 7 widget data objects. No exported aggregate type exists.
tasks.output_state: DashboardData type exported from dashboard-page.loader.ts using Awaited<ReturnType<>> pattern. Type automatically infers tuple structure from loadDashboardPageData return value. Lint and format commands pass. TypeScript compilation succeeds.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: DashboardData type is exported and TypeScript correctly infers the tuple type containing all 7 widget data structures
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && grep -q 'export type DashboardData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof loadDashboardPageData>>' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm lint:fix && pnpm format:fix
